entry.title: 2048 - Open Source Puzzle Game
entry.content:
About the Game

2048 is a simple, addictive, and open-source number puzzle game. Slide tiles to combine the same numbers and try to reach the 2048 tile.

It runs entirely in the browser — no installation, no ads, no account required.

How to Play

  • Desktop: Arrow keys (↑ ↓ ← →)
  • Mobile: Swipe screen
  • Refresh page to restart

Play Online

Play Now

Open Source Info

  • GitHub: https://github.com/gabrielecirulli/2048
  • License: MIT (free & open-source)
